title: Find the Divisibility Array of a String
titleCn: 找出字符串的可整除数组

testcases.input: word = "998244353", m = 3 Output: [1,1,0,0,0,1,1,0,0] Explanation: There are only 4 prefixes that are divisible by 3: "9", "99", "998244", and "9982443".
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,1,0,0,0,1,1,0,0] Explanation: There are only 4 prefixes that are divisible by 3: "9", "99", "998244", and "9982443".

testcases.input: word = "1010", m = 10 Output: [0,1,0,1] Explanation: There are only 2 prefixes that are divisible by 10: "10", and "1010".
testcases.expectedOutput: [0,1,0,1] Explanation: There are only 2 prefixes that are divisible by 10: "10", and "1010".
